## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Release / packaging

## Checklist

- [ ] Rack signoff passes locally (`uv run rack run --all`)
- [ ] Package build and installed-wheel smoke test pass locally
- [ ] L99 signoff passes (no missing design docs, manifests in sync,
      docstrings present, contracts validate)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under an `[Unreleased]` or release section
- [ ] If a new public CLI command was added: design doc + command manifest
      entry + tests
- [ ] If a new public library interface was added: design doc +
      interface manifest entry + tests
- [ ] If a new dependency was added: justification appended to ADR-0002
